positive: A geometric, symmetrical depiction of a mystical forest scene under a nebula sky. The composition features stylized, sharply defined silhouettes of ancient, glowing trees and crystalline flora arranged in a central vertical pattern. The color palette is deep sapphire blues, vibrant amethyst purples, emerald greens, and accents of gold glitter dust. The style should emulate a modern, highly detailed linocut engraving mixed with iridescent cosmic ink wash. Focus on strong contrast between the deep, velvety background and the sharply outlined foreground elements. Full body composition, clean edges, suitable for direct apparel transfer.
negative: blur, artifacts, lowres, noise, text, signature, watermark, logo, blurry edges, extra limbs, malformed, bad anatomy, grainy, messy, solid color background
